rulings.Case Title: ADA SORTO ET AL VS. WEDGEWOOD, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Order Granting Leave For Late Disclosure Of Expert Witnesses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 18, 2017, line 5. PLAINTIFF ADA SORTO, MARIO SORTO, ADA MENDEZ's Motion For Court Order Granting Leave For Late Disclosure Of Expert Witnesses GRANTED. Mr. Bluer shall be made available for deposition on the date selected by Defendants (parties are ordered to meet and confer in good faith re: date of deposition and advise the Court of the selected date at the hearing). Plaintiff to compensate the Defendant for the additional costs of expedited transcript, if expedited transcript is necessary. = (501/REQ)
